observability.title: Observability
observability.subtitle: Platform resource usage and service health (dev metrics; wire to Prometheus in production).
observability.hint: Connect analytics/prometeus_grafana for live CPU, RAM, and traffic charts.

speculative.title: Speculative live estimator
speculative.subtitle: Compare production OPEX vs revenue — speculative ROI for deployment planning.

revenue.trendDesc: Updates when you change OPEX configs or period filter.

opex.hourlyUnit: Based on hourly unit prices × ~730 h/mo

financeReferrals.title: Referrals & bonuses
financeReferrals.pageSubtitle: Attract clients and drivers with links, coupons, and loyalty points.

coupons.usedReadOnly: Redemptions are created when a client applies a code at checkout.
coupons.confirmDeleteDesc: Remove code “{{code}}”? Existing redemption logs stay in history.

financeReferrals.settingsIntro: Configure each program separately. Client program includes loyalty on purchases plus referral rewards. Driver program is referral-only (no loyalty).
financeReferrals.clientRulesHint: Points on purchases (tier packages) and bonuses when clients refer others.
financeReferrals.driverRulesHint: Referral bonuses only — no loyalty points for drivers.
financeReferrals.pointsPerDollarHint: e.g. 1000 points = $1 when a client redeems loyalty.

settings.loyaltyHint: Award points by order amount. Highest matching tier applies (e.g. $10+ trip → 100 pts).
settings.noPackages: No tiers yet — add one to reward purchases.
settings.invitesRequiredHint: Referrer gets the goal bonus when this many users joined via their link.
settings.firstPurchaseRowTitle: When joined client completes first purchase
settings.driverEarnRowTitle: When joined driver reaches earnings (first time)
settings.driverEarnBonus: Referrer bonus when joined driver hits earnings (first time) (CAD)
settings.clientInviteClientHint: Another client signs up with this client's referral.
settings.clientInviteDriverHint: A driver signs up with this client's referral.
settings.driverInviteClientHint: A client signs up with this driver's referral.
settings.driverInviteDriverHint: Another driver signs up with this driver's referral.

financeReferrals.confirmDeleteReferralDesc: Remove campaign for {{email}} and its joined users?
financeReferrals.loyaltyNoDelete: Adjust points via Edit instead of delete.

financeTariffs.title: Tariffs & commissions
financeTariffs.subtitle: Four driver packages (Basic, Essential, Pro, Pro+). Commission on earned balance; drivers withdraw anytime.
financeTariffs.subtitleEditable: Basic, Essential, Pro, and Pro+ are built-in defaults. You can also create additional custom packages with your own pricing and perks.
financeTariffs.confirmDeleteDesc: Delete “{{name}}”? Drivers on this plan must be migrated first. This cannot be undone.
financeTariffs.cannotDeleteSystemDesc: “{{name}}” is a default template and cannot be removed. Turn it off with the switch or edit its pricing and perks.
financeTariffs.cannotDeleteBasicDesc: “{{name}}” is the default plan for all drivers and cannot be deleted. You can edit its settings.
financeTariffs.search: Search packages by name, code, or description…

form.name: Display name
form.recurrencesHint: Monthly billing cycles until Valid till expires
form.validUntilHint: Package stops renewing after this date and time
form.payoutDelayHint: Wait time after the driver requests a withdrawal
form.payoutDaysHint: Business days before transfer after withdrawal request

display.title: Card appearance
display.textModeAutoHint: Commission, perks, and subscription text get readable pill backgrounds from your card color.
display.textModeCustomHint: Set text and pill background for each line yourself.
display.badgeImageHint: PNG recommended; transparent background works best.
display.badgeImageType: Please upload a PNG or image file.

features.searchPriorityHint: Show this driver higher in client search
features.searchPriorityRankHint: Lower number = higher priority in search
features.removeAdsHint: Hide minor advertisements for subscribed drivers
features.promotedListingHint: Highlighted in client app search results

financePaychecks.title: Driver paychecks
financePaychecks.subtitle: Withdrawal queue and driver earned balances. Drivers request payouts from the app; transfers follow package pending rules.
financePaychecks.search: Search by driver name, username, or email…
financePaychecks.holdDesc: The payout leaves the auto-pay queue until resumed. You can notify the driver with a reason.
financePaychecks.resumeDesc: Return this payout to the pending queue.
financePaychecks.cancelDesc: Cancel this payout. The driver can be notified by app and email.
financePaychecks.deleteDesc: Remove this record. Pending items are removed from the payout queue and database.
financePaychecks.deleteHeldBlocked: Cancel this paycheck before deleting it.

financeActions.notifyHint: Send in-app message and email (default template if reason is empty)
financeActions.reasonPlaceholder: Optional reason shown in the notification…

financeSubscribers.holdDesc: Pause auto paychecks for this subscription. Notify the driver optionally.
financeSubscribers.resumeDesc: Re-activate the subscription and schedule the next paycheck.
financeSubscribers.cancelDesc: End this subscription. The driver can be notified.
financeSubscribers.deleteDesc: Remove this subscription record from the database.

financeDriversAmount.payDesc: Withdraw from {{email}}'s earned balance (available: ${{balance}}). A pending paycheck will be added to Paying.
financeDriversAmount.payHint: Deducted from earned balance; follows the driver's package payout delay.

financeCheckouts.title: Checkout funnel
financeCheckouts.subtitle: Clients who reached checkout on mobile — completed, cancelled, or abandoned (for recovery).
financeCheckouts.search: Search by client, driver, route, or session ID…

stats.totalHint: Checkout attempts in the last 200 events
stats.fareVolumeHint: Sum of fare estimates where set

financeCheckouts.confirmDeleteDesc: Remove this session from history? This cannot be undone.

recovery.title: Recovery reminder
recovery.description: Schedule a custom message to bring the client back to checkout. Choose email, app notification, and when to send.
recovery.messagePlaceholder: Write what the client should see…
recovery.defaultMessage: You left a ride in checkout — tap to finish booking when you're ready.
recovery.sendEmailHint: Send to the client's account email
recovery.sendPushHint: In-app and push alert on mobile

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: KPIs and trends from live trips, ratings, and feedback data.
analytics.loadError: Could not load analytics from the server.

admin.subtitle: Real-time overview
admin.ridesPerDay: Ride requests per day · last 7 days

settings.title: Platform settings
settings.description: App name, timezone, and default language for all users.

profile.title: Edit profile
profile.description: Photo, name, contact, and address shown on your admin account.

general.title: General platform
general.description: App branding, locale, ride defaults, and maintenance mode.
general.scheduledRidesHint: Allow clients to book rides in advance.
general.maintenanceHint: Blocks new ride requests and shows a banner.

payment.title: Payment settings
payment.description: Stripe mode, fees, fares, and payout rules.
payment.secretsHint: Stripe secret keys stay in server environment variables — only publishable keys are stored here.

mail.subject: Subject
mail.placeholders: Variables are replaced when the email is sent.

notifications.title: Notification routing
notifications.description: Choose which events notify clients, drivers, and staff — per channel.

staff.subtitle: Manage moderators, agents, and support — assign roles and permissions.
staff.roleAssigned: Role assigned — user must sign in again to refresh access.
staff.userNotFound: No user with this email. They must register first.
staff.name: Name
staff.permissionMatrixHint: Check capabilities per role. Admins can edit agent/support; moderators edit their team.
staff.confirmDeleteRole: Delete this role? It must not be assigned to anyone.

delete.title: Delete item
delete.descriptionBulk: Choose how to remove {{count}} selected items.
delete.softHint: Hide from lists; data can be restored later.
delete.permanentHint: Remove account and data — cannot be undone.
delete.dangerHint: Permanent deletion erases this account from the platform.

profile.manageHint: Full admin control when the user cannot edit their own profile. Custom fields are stored as key/value pairs.

list.searchUsers: Search by name, email, ID, phone…
list.searchStaff: Search staff by name, email, role…
list.searchDrivers: Search drivers by name, email, ID…
list.searchRoles: Search roles by name or description…

users.subtitle: Client accounts — search, suspend, and review activity.

drivers.subtitle: Drivers KYC queue and registered drivers.
drivers.viewDocumentError: Could not load this file. It may not have been uploaded yet.
drivers.openInNewTab: Open file in a new tab
drivers.rejectDocumentHint: The driver will be notified in the app and by email.
drivers.carsHint: Review each car profile, media, and documents. Approve or reject individually.
drivers.noCarsYet: This driver has not registered any cars yet.
drivers.documentsHint: Required personal documents for driver verification. Missing items are shown explicitly.
drivers.noVehicleDocs: No documents uploaded for this car.

tickets.subtitle: Support inbox — reply to clients and drivers.
tickets.selectTicket: Select a ticket to view the thread.

audit.subtitle: Immutable audit trail for admin actions.

activity.subtitle: General actions by staff and system — tariffs, users, payouts, referrals, and settings.
activity.search: Search action, target, or actor ID…

payments.subtitle: Successful charges and payment intents from client checkout.
payments.search: Search by client email, payment ID, trip…

notifications.subtitle: Your inbox — support alerts and platform messages for this account.

messages.pageSubtitle: Send instant or scheduled messages to clients or drivers — push and/or email.
messages.listSubtitle: Message history — drafts, scheduled, and sent campaigns.
messages.composeSubtitle: Use template tokens in the body; save as draft or send when ready.
messages.subtitle: Campaign composer — saved to history for reuse.
messages.previewEmpty: Write a message to preview it…
messages.delayHint: 0 = send immediately when the campaign API is live.
messages.historySubtitle: Previously sent messages and drafts — edit, resend, or delete.

chatSupport.subtitle: Reply to support tickets from clients and drivers.
chatSupport.searchPlaceholder: Search by subject, category, ticket id, or user…
chatSupport.createTicketSubtitleClients: Select a client, set the topic, and send the first message.
chatSupport.createTicketSubtitleDrivers: Select a driver, set the topic, and send the first message.
chatSupport.searchUserPlaceholder: Search by name, email, or id…
chatSupport.subject: Subject

feedbacks.pageSubtitle: Service quality, satisfaction, and disputes over time.
feedbacks.subtitle: Track UX, driver service, and staff interactions; manage escalations and litiges.
feedbacks.productDesc: App quality, booking flow, pricing — general product dissatisfaction.
feedbacks.driversDesc: Driver behaviour, bans, trip issues — complaints about drivers.
feedbacks.staffDesc: Agent quality and high criticism — disputes with support staff.
feedbacks.loadErrorHint: If this is a fresh environment, restart ryvo-functions so migrations apply seed 037.

chart.title: Service quality over time
chart.hint: Click a point to see what drove satisfaction up or down in that period.

map.pageSubtitle: Real-time fleet map with online drivers.
map.subtitle: Track online drivers and active trips in real time.
map.searchDriver: Search by name or driver id…
map.searchPlace: Search address or place on the map…
map.noPlaceSuggestions: No matching places. Press Go to search.

settingsTasks.subtitle: Delete or archive data on a schedule — once, daily, weekly, or at a specific date and time.
settingsTasks.search: Search tasks by name or type…

form.name: Task name
form.kindHint: HTTP tasks call existing internal APIs. Presets are built-in safe operations.
form.httpHint: MVP safety: only `cron-jobs/*` paths are allowed (service-signed).
form.operationHint: Only whitelisted operations can run automatically. More actions will be added later.
form.dayOfWeekHint: MVP: numeric weekday. UI will become a dropdown.
form.dayOfMonthHint: We cap at 28 to avoid missing days.
form.startPausedHint: Create the task but do not run until resumed.

settingsTasks.comingDesc: Define conditions, delays, and actions (e.g. purge abandoned checkouts after 90 days).

examples.deleteOldData: Delete records matching conditions after a delay
examples.oneTime: One-time run at a specific date and hour

security.subtitle: Login attempts, authentication events, and registered devices for clients, drivers, and staff.
security.revokeDesc: Disconnect “{{device}}” for {{user}}? They will need to sign in again on that device.
security.footerMeta: {{count}} events · Hash-chain verified ✓ · WORM storage active
